issues.description: Rest action should have a cost indicator. The effect text says 'You may rest 1 of your [Uta] cards' which is a cost (conditional requirement), not a direct action. This should be represented as a cost property or restructured to show the Rest as a prerequisite condition.

Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn' text, but the structure conflates the cost (rest a Uta card) with the effect (power boost). The Rest should be a cost, not an action in the same sequence.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your [Uta] cards: This Character gains +5000 power during this turn.
